title: The Binding Of Isaac Mod
description: A Minecraft mod that adds mechanics, enemies and items from the game "The Binding Of Isaac"
body:
a.k.a. TBOI Mod

Important:
- -The first time you enter the world, your health will down to 5 hearts, that's okay! Your health can be increased by absorbing HP-up items.
- -After you die, your health and stats reset to default.

How to find the Basement?
- Basements spawn underground everywhere in the Overworld, except for world spaw. Unfortunately, /locate does not work correctly with them.

The mod currently contains:

---from The Binding Of Isaac Repetance:
- -Shooting tears ("C" by default)
- -Basements with rooms. special rooms and boss rooms
- -16 Bosses
- -67 Monsters
- -Angel and Devil deals
- -Pickups (Such as pennies, bombs, keys, chests etc)
- -7 Item Pools, 5 Machines and 6 Beggars
- -103 Passive Items
- -49 Active Items
- -22 Trinkets (and rare golden variations)
- -7 Curses
- -(almost) 45 Cards and 25 Pill effects
- -New "R Key"-dimension
- -Pablo
- -etc

In the future, I plan to add all the items and all the monsters from the original game, cut content, foul souls and the legend of bum-bo. Good luck and, of course,

Thank you and have fun!
